params.name: name
params.description:
The name of the group. This is the same as the group name shown in
the Confluence administration console.

items.docs:
Returns a user group for a given group name.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to access the Confluence site ('Can use' global permission).

params.name: id
params.description: The id of the group.

items.docs:
Returns a user group for a given group id.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to access the Confluence site ('Can use' global permission).

params.name: id
params.description: Id of the group to delete.

items.docs:
Delete user group.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
User must be a site admin.

params.name: groupName
params.description:
The name of the group. This is the same as the group name shown in
the Confluence administration console.

items.docs:
Returns a user group for a given group name.

Use updated Get group API

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to access the Confluence site ('Can use' global permission).

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the group to be queried for its members.

params.name: start
params.description: The starting index of the returned users.

params.name: limit
params.description:
The maximum number of users to return per page.
Note, this is restricted by fixed system limit of 200 which is to say if the limit parameter
exceeds 200, this API will return a maximum of 200 users per page.

params.name: shouldReturnTotalSize
params.description:
Whether to include total size parameter in the results.
Note, fetching total size property is an expensive operation; use it if your use case needs this value.

params.name: expand
params.description:
A multi-value parameter indicating which properties of the user to
expand.

  - `operations` returns the operations that the user is allowed to do.
  - `personalSpace` returns the user's personal space, if it exists.
  - `isExternalCollaborator` returns whether the user is an external collaborator user.

items.docs:
Returns the users that are members of a group.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to access the Confluence site ('Can use' global permission).

params.name: groupName
params.description: The name of the group to be queried for its members.

params.name: start
params.description: The starting index of the returned users.

params.description:
The maximum number of users to return per page.
Note, this may be restricted by fixed system limits.

items.docs:

info.name: Atlassian Search Groups by Partial Query

params.name: query
params.description: the search term used to query results.

params.name: start
params.description: The starting index of the returned groups.

params.name: limit
params.description:
The maximum number of groups to return per page.
Note, this is restricted to a maximum limit of 200 groups.

params.name: shouldReturnTotalSize
params.description:
Whether to include total size parameter in the results.
Note, fetching total size property is an expensive operation; use it if your use case needs this value.

items.docs: Get search results of groups by partial query provided.

info.name: Atlassian Add Member to Group by Groupid

params.name: groupId
params.description: GroupId of the group whose membership is updated

items.docs:
Adds a user as a member in a group represented by its groupId

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
User must be a site admin.

info.name: Atlassian Remove Member From Group Using Group Id

params.name: groupId
params.description: Id of the group whose membership is updated.

items.docs:
Remove user as a member from a group.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
User must be a site admin.
